title: Skopeo copy error: failed to read from destination repository
body:
Hi,
`skopeo version 1.2.0`
When I run 
```skopeo copy --dest-tls-verify=false docker://ubuntu:latest docker://localhost:5000/ubuntu:latest --debug```
I got error:
```FATA[0007] Error trying to reuse blob sha256:da7391352a9bb76b292a568c066aa4c3cbae8d494e6a3c68e3c596d34f7c75f8 at destination: failed to read from destination repository ubuntu: 500 (Internal Server Error) ```

Debug log:
```
skopeo copy --dest-tls-verify=false docker://ubuntu:latest docker://localhost:5000/ubuntu:latest --debug
DEBU[0000] Credentials not found                        
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration 
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for localhost:5000/ubuntu:latest, using built-in default file:///home/user/.local/share/containers/sigstore 
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/localhost:5000 
DEBU[0000] Loading registries configuration "/etc/containers/registries.conf" 
DEBU[0000] Trying to access "docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest" 
DEBU[0000] Credentials not found                        
DEBU[0000] Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration 
DEBU[0000]  No signature storage configuration found for docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest, using built-in default file:///home/user/.local/share/containers/sigstore 
DEBU[0000] Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker.io 
DEBU[0000] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/         
DEBU[0001] Ping https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/ status 401 
DEBU[0001] GET https://auth.docker.io/token?scope=repository%3Alibrary%2Fubuntu%3Apull&service=registry.docker.io 
DEBU[0002] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/ubuntu/manifests/latest 
DEBU[0003] Content-Type from manifest GET is "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json" 
DEBU[0003] Using blob info cache at /home/user/.local/share/containers/cache/blob-info-cache-v1.boltdb 
DEBU[0003] Source is a manifest list; copying (only) instance sha256:4e4bc990609ed865e07afc8427c30ffdddca5153fd4e82c20d8f0783a291e241 for current system 
DEBU[0003] GET https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/ubuntu/manifests/sha256:4e4bc990609ed865e07afc8427c30ffdddca5153fd4e82c20d8f0783a291e241 
DEBU[0005] Content-Type from manifest GET is "application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json" 
DEBU[0005] IsRunningImageAllowed for image docker:docker.io/library/ubuntu:latest 
DEBU[0005]  Using default policy section                
DEBU[0005]  Requirement 0: allowed                      
DEBU[0005] Overall: allowed                             
Getting image source signatures
DEBU[0005] Reading /home/user/.local/share/containers/sigstore/library/ubuntu@sha256=4e4bc990609ed865e07afc8427c30ffdddca5153fd4e82c20d8f0783a291e241/signature-1 
DEBU[0005] Manifest has MIME type application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, ordered candidate list [application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+prettyjws, application/vnd.oci.image.manifest.v1+json, application/vnd.oci.image.index.v1+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.list.v2+json, application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v1+json] 
DEBU[0005] ... will first try using the original manifest unmodified 
DEBU[0005] Checking /v2/ubuntu/blobs/sha256:2c2d948710f21ad82dce71743b1654b45acb5c059cf5c19da491582cef6f2601 
DEBU[0005] Checking /v2/ubuntu/blobs/sha256:da7391352a9bb76b292a568c066aa4c3cbae8d494e6a3c68e3c596d34f7c75f8 
DEBU[0005] GET https://localhost:5000/v2/               
DEBU[0005] Checking /v2/ubuntu/blobs/sha256:14428a6d4bcdba49a64127900a0691fb00a3f329aced25eb77e3b65646638f8d 
DEBU[0005] Ping https://localhost:5000/v2/ err Get "https://localhost:5000/v2/": http: server gave HTTP response to HTTPS client (&url.Error{Op:"Get", URL:"https://localhost:5000/v2/", Err:(*errors.errorString)(0xc0003b8850)}) 
DEBU[0005] GET http://localhost:5000/v2/                
DEBU[0005] Ping http://localhost:5000/v2/ status 200    
DEBU[0005] HEAD http://localhost:5000/v2/ubuntu/blobs/sha256:2c2d948710f21ad82dce71743b1654b45acb5c059cf5c19da491582cef6f2601 
DEBU[0005] HEAD http://localhost:5000/v2/ubuntu/blobs/sha256:da7391352a9bb76b292a568c066aa4c3cbae8d494e6a3c68e3c596d34f7c75f8 
DEBU[0005] HEAD http://localhost:5000/v2/ubuntu/blobs/sha256:14428a6d4bcdba49a64127900a0691fb00a3f329aced25eb77e3b65646638f8d 
FATA[0007] Error trying to reuse blob sha256:da7391352a9bb76b292a568c066aa4c3cbae8d494e6a3c68e3c596d34f7c75f8 at destination: failed to read from destination repository ubuntu: 500 (Internal Server Error) 
```

comments.body: Thanks for your report. An “internal server error” pretty much has to be diagnosed server-side, in this case in the logs of the relevant server.
